definition: Data parameters events states commands or observations that enter a procedure.
The value label ranking decision alert file update or error returned by a procedure.
The condition or memory of a procedure system model or workflow at a moment.
A rule that changes one state into another.
A rule determining when a procedure should halt hand off return or report failure.
A property that should remain true throughout execution.
A condition required before a procedure runs.
A condition that should hold after a procedure completes.
Explicit communication of invalid input no solution uncertainty out-of-scope use or procedural failure.
